questionText: You are building an e-commerce platform. questionText: Which are valid criticisms of the Simple Factory idiom? Select 1 or more answers
options: It tends to violate the Open/Closed Principle as new types are added
Its conditional chain grows with every new product
It can return null for unknown inputs
It cannot create objects at all
It forces every product to be a singleton
correctAnswers: It tends to violate the Open/Closed Principle as new types are added
Its conditional chain grows with every new product
It can return null for unknown inputs
explanation: Adding products means editing the factory (OCP), the if/switch grows, and unknown inputs may yield null. The last two options are false.

questionText: Factory Method vs Abstract Factory: which statement is TRUE?

Abstract Factory creates exactly one product; Factory Method creates families
Abstract Factory is a behavioral pattern
correctAnswers: Factory Method creates one product via subclassing; Abstract Factory creates whole families of related products
explanation: Factory Method = one product through overriding; Abstract Factory = a set of related products behind one factory interface.

questionText: A cross-platform UI toolkit must produce matching sets of widgets — a Windows family (WinButton, WinScrollbar, WinMenu) and a macOS family (MacButton, MacScrollbar, MacMenu) — so that a whole consistent set is created together. Which single design pattern fits best?
explanation: Creating coordinated families of related products behind one factory interface is the Abstract Factory pattern.

questionText: Which statements about Abstract Factory are TRUE? Select 1 or more answers
options: It creates families of related objects without naming their concrete classes
Each concrete factory produces one consistent product family
It guarantees a single global instance
It converts one interface into another
correctAnswers: It creates families of related objects without naming their concrete classes
Each concrete factory produces one consistent product family
explanation: Abstract Factory is creational and builds consistent product families behind abstractions; it is not Singleton or Adapter.
